title: neoalsomitra schefferiana subsp. podagrica
intro: Neoalsomitra schefferiana subsp. podagrica, also known as the Alsomitra podagrica, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae, commonly found in tropical forests of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, making it useful in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Alsomitra podagrica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, which are used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin infections.
